compressed_prompt: Generate a forum thread about several people waiting to hear the latest local news. All sentences should be short. Refrain from using any commas. Use placeholders to represent different usernames. Use square brackets for placeholders, like [username1], [username2]. Please include at least 20 placeholders in the thread.
response:
**Thread Title: "Anyone else refreshing nonstop for updates?"**

---

**[username1]**
Anyone else glued to their phone right now? Local news site hasn’t updated in hours.

**[username2]**
Same. My hands are shaking from the coffee. Need answers.

**[username3]**
Radio silence everywhere. Even the scanner apps are quiet.

**[username4]**
I called the station. They said “wait for the press conference.” Useless.

**[username5]**
Press conference? When? No one’s saying.

**[username6]**
I saw a cop car speed by with lights on. Something’s happening.

**[username7]**
That’s the third one today. My neighbor said it’s bad.

**[username8]**
Bad how? Give me details!

**[username9]**
Twitter’s blowing up but nothing official. Just rumors.

**[username10]**
Rumors are worse than silence. My stomach is in knots.

**[username11]**
I texted my cousin at the courthouse. She said “not now.”

**[username12]**
“Not now”? That’s terrifying.

**[username13]**
I drove past the scene. Barricades everywhere. No reporters.

**[username14]**
Why no reporters? That’s weird.

**[username15]**
Maybe they’re being briefed first. Or something’s really wrong.

**[username16]**
I just want to know if my kids are safe at school.

**[username17]**
Schools are locked down. No one’s answering the front desk.

**[username18]**
This is insane. I’m pacing like a maniac.

**[username19]**
Same. My dog is staring at me like I’m crazy.

**[username20]**
I’m refreshing the county website every 10 seconds. Still nothing.

**[username21]**
Wait—just got a push alert. Stand by.

**[username22]**
WHAT DOES IT SAY?!

**[username21]**
“Official statement at 3 PM.” That’s all.

**[username23]**
THREE PM?! That’s an hour away!

**[username24]**
I can’t wait that long. I’m losing it.

**[username25]**
Me too. Someone please just tell us something.
